description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service and DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 variable. In the build stage add a build:gitlab job that runs the global before_script `docker info`, then logs into the GitLab registry with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p "$CI_BUILD_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY"`, extracts the version via `export VERSION=$(grep ' VERSION' 1.0/Dockerfile.arm64|awk -F" " '{ print $3 }')`, echoes it, builds the controller image with `docker build --build-arg CERT_MANAGER_COMPONENT=controller -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:controller-v${VERSION}.arm64.latest" 1.0 -f 1.0/Dockerfile.arm64` and pushes it, builds the acmesolver image with `docker build --build-arg CERT_MANAGER_COMPONENT=acmesolver -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:acmesolver-v${VERSION}.arm64.latest" 1.0 -f 1.0/Dockerfile.arm64` and pushes it, and runs only on the master branch. Also in the build stage add a build:hub job that runs `docker info`, logs into Docker Hub with `docker login -u $DOCKER_USER -p $DOCKER_PASS`, performs the same VERSION extraction, builds and pushes the controller image as `zeiot/$CI_PROJECT_NAME:controller-v${VERSION}.arm64.latest` and the acmesolver image as `zeiot/$CI_PROJECT_NAME:acmesolver-v${VERSION}.arm64.latest`, also limited to the master branch. In the deploy stage add a deploy:gitlab job that logs into the GitLab registry, extracts VERSION, builds and pushes controller and acmesolver images without the .latest suffix (`docker build ... -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:controller-v${VERSION}.arm64"` and `docker build ... -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:acmesolver-v${VERSION}.arm64"`), running only on tag pipelines. Add a deploy:hub job that logs into Docker Hub, extracts VERSION, builds and pushes the same images to `zeiot/$CI_PROJECT_NAME:controller-v${VERSION}.arm64` and `zeiot/$CI_PROJECT_NAME:acmesolver-v${VERSION}.arm64`, also only on tags. Finally, in the manifest stage add a manifest:gitlab job that logs into the GitLab registry, extracts VERSION, creates multi‑arch manifests with `docker manifest create ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:controller-v${VERSION} ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:controller-v${VERSION}.arm ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:controller-v${VERSION}.arm64`, annotates them for arm and arm64 with `docker manifest annotate ... --os linux --arch arm` and `... --arch arm64`, pushes the manifest, repeats the process for acmesolver, and runs only on tags.
